3039010.name: Echo's Inc
3039010.description:
Echo’s Inc

Play as Melvin, an employee finishing a late shift at Echo’s Inc. What begins as a quiet night quickly spirals into something far more disturbing. Strange noises echo through the halls. The building feels wrong.

Gameplay

Explore. Observe. Survive.

Echo’s Inc is a first-person psychological horror experience focused on atmosphere and environmental storytelling.

  • Immersive first-person exploration

  • Psychological horror without combat

  • Tense, logic-driven puzzles

  • Hidden areas that reward curiosity

  • Story discovered through documents and audio logs

  • Environmental clues that piece together a larger mystery

Visuals & Atmosphere

The horror lives in the environment.

  • Volumetric lighting and thick fog blur dreams and reality

  • Unnatural shadows that feel almost alive

  • Subtle visual distortions and post-processing effects

  • Shifting spaces that create unease

  • Sound design that keeps constant psychological pressure

Key Features

  • Narrative-driven psychological horror

  • Immersive, tension-focused experience

  • No combat — pure atmosphere

  • Story told through environments and subtle details

  • Hidden content for replayability

  • A focused 15–20 minute experience
3039010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
